productDisplayName: Nike Men Court Resonate White Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike Court Resonate shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the super-stylish, these shoes have a simple Sports look. Featuring texture and molded details and low ankle, the nike Court Resonate casual shoes are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees to look cool and casual. Upper Leather upper for absolute durability and flexibility, molded with Nike swoosh Perforations for ventilation Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded textile tongue and collar for all-day comfort Subtle branding on back heel, brand tab on tongue and Nike swoosh on sides Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and advanced cushioning Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
